src.description: Image shown in the viewer. For PDFs this is a separate preview image, since an can't render a PDF.

downloads.description: When present, the viewer shows one button per download instead of a single Download of `src` (e.g. A4 + Letter variants of a print).

direct.description: Listed as a plain download link on the index page (no viewer page).

tableau.description: When set, the viewer shows the major-arcana tableau spread in this art style (a Major style id from tarot-styles.ts) as the preview, instead of a single .

minorTableau.description: When true, the viewer shows the 56 minor-arcana cards as a per-suit preview gallery (Josh Yates style) instead of a single .

rounded.description: Set false to drop the rounded corners on the viewer preview image (e.g. for full-bleed art where rounding clips the corners).
